Summary Imagine what you could do here! At Apple, new ideas have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish. The people here at Apple don’t just build products — they create the kind of wonder that’s revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts. Join Apple, you will help us leave the world better than we found it. Description In this highly visible role, you will manage selection, implementation & optimization of manufacturing processes for mechanical enclosure subassemblies for our legendary products. You will utilize your Mechanical Engineering experience and work cross functionally with Product Design Engineering and Industrial Design to assess product features for manufacturability, and recommend capable production processes and equipment. Collaborate with MDEs counterpart in the development of mechanical processes. Collaborate with Global Supply Managers to develop new equipment from RFQ through factory implementation, and manufacture and deliver material to downstream supply chain nodes on time and on cost. You will work with Mechanical Quality Engineers to drive yield improvement through analyses of part quality, defect Pareto, and SPC. A heavy emphasis will be on working with suppliers to define and refine mechanical tooling and fixtures, and establishing process capability and readiness. Coordination of activities and direction through clear communication between the Asia and US-based teams, and vendors is a necessity. You may audit supplier secondary processes as well as support product phase builds from prototype through ramp and mass production. Provide leadership at manufacturing sites during development and product production ramp, and drive engineering issues to resolution Use data to drive process decisions, basic data analysis, DOEs, SPC, etc. Design best-in-class process based on cosmetic and drawing requirement, mapping out and document process flow and details which includes selecting processing equipments, designing fixtures/automations, initiating DOEs to find out the best process and parameters, and finalizing the process solution from prototype stage to mass production stage. Define part tolerance and specifications by demonstrating process capability to Product Designers and Industrial Designers. Lead process development/have expertise in assembly - develop automation/fixture for assembly, bonding process (glue, welding), laser process(welding/cutting/etch/surface treatment) etc. Own yield improvement actions and process change decisions based on statistical process control (SPC) data analysis. Identify, research, develop, and qualify premier equipment manufacturers and suppliers. Minimum Qualifications Bachelor degree in Mechanical, Manufacturing or Industry Engineering. Fluent in English as a working language (verbal and written). Preferred Qualifications Master, Ph. D or oversea education background is a plus, proven track record of outstanding academic performances is preferred. Cross disciplinary knowledges like mechatronics, control theory, coding and machine learning are considered plus. A standout teammate and self starter with innovation, integrity and attention to details. Ability to work on manufacturing sites independently and willingness on over 50% travel frequently (mainly in Asia).

job_title: Chuyên viên phụ trách chiến lược tài khoản, Phân khúc Bán hàng cho thị trường tầm trung, Nhóm Giải pháp khách hàng của Google
industries: Information Services and Technology, Information and Internet
job_description: Please visit this Google Careers posting for the Vietnamese-translated version of this role. Minimum qualifications: Bằng cử nhân hoặc kinh nghiệm thực tế tương đương. 2 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực quảng cáo kỹ thuật số, tư vấn bán hàng, kinh doanh truyền thông kỹ thuật số, phát triển kinh doanh, môi trường truyền thông trực tuyến, hoặc tiếp thị kỹ thuật số. Preferred qualifications: Kinh nghiệm bán hàng trong lĩnh vực công nghệ, quảng cáo, bán hàng qua kênh truyền thông hoặc môi trường Internet. Kinh nghiệm về truyền thông trên nhiều nền tảng (ví dụ: truyền hình, đài phát thanh, ấn phẩm, hoạt động tài trợ, v.v.). Kinh nghiệm quản lý nhiều tài khoản cùng lúc với sự tỉ mỉ. Hiểu biết về cách quản lý tài khoản Google Ads và YouTube, cũng như về các chiến dịch quảng cáo hoặc truyền thông. Năng lực thành công trong một môi trường liên tục thay đổi với kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề, tư duy sáng tạo và kỹ năng phân tích xuất sắc. About The Job Doanh nghiệp thuộc mọi loại hình và quy mô tin tưởng vào các giải pháp quảng cáo vượt trội của Google để phát triển trong môi trường tiếp thị năng động hiện nay. Bạn lan toả niềm đam mê bán hàng, sự hiểu biết về truyền thông trực tuyến và lòng quyết tâm giúp khách hàng đạt được thành công lớn nhất. Bạn hành động với tinh thần làm chủ, nhanh nhạy thích ứng với mọi thay đổi, tìm kiếm những cách thức mới mang tính chiến lược để liên tục đem đến kết quả ấn tượng và ngày một tốt hơn cho cả Google và khách hàng. Bạn xây dựng mối quan hệ đáng tin cậy với khách hàng, tìm hiểu nhu cầu kinh doanh của họ và dựa vào đó để xây dựng các giải pháp hiệu quả giúp khách hàng đạt được những mục tiêu lớn lao nhất. Bạn gặt hái thành công cùng đội ngũ bán hàng, định hình tương lai của ngành quảng cáo trong kỷ nguyên AI và tạo dấu ấn thực sự đối với hàng triệu công ty cũng như hàng tỷ người dùng đặt trọn niềm tin vào Google cho những mục tiêu quan trọng nhất. Đội ngũ bán hàng thuộc Nhóm Giải pháp khách hàng của Google (GCS) gồm các chuyên viên tư vấn đáng tin cậy và đại diện bán hàng cạnh tranh, luôn tập trung vào việc hỗ trợ khách hàng đạt thành công bằng cách mang những dịch vụ tốt nhất của Google đến với các doanh nghiệp vừa và nhỏ (SMB) — một phần không thể thiếu trong cộng đồng của chúng tôi. Là một thành viên trong nhóm, bạn sẽ có cơ hội làm việc với các chủ doanh nghiệp, góp phần tạo nên sự khác biệt thực sự cho doanh nghiệp bằng cách hỗ trợ họ phát triển. Cùng nhau, chúng ta sẽ giúp định hình một tương lai đổi mới cho các khách hàng, đối tác và đại diện bán hàng... cũng như tận hưởng hành trình đó. Responsibilities Xây dựng cũng như quản lý mối quan hệ với các khách hàng ở vị trí quản lý cấp cao và các bên liên quan là đối tác cấp cao. Nỗ lực nắm bắt toàn diện những thách thức đối với doanh nghiệp, mục tiêu tiếp thị và các chỉ số đo lường mức độ thành công của họ. Xây dựng một chiến lược chung rõ ràng, dài hạn giữa Google và khách hàng, đồng thời dẫn dắt một phòng ban liên ngành trong Google để cộng tác trong các dự án và mang lại thành công cho khách hàng. Lập kế hoạch và đạt được mục tiêu tăng trưởng thông qua việc giới thiệu các sản phẩm/giải pháp quảng cáo của Google giúp khách hàng đạt được mục tiêu tiếp thị của họ. Đưa ra các bản phân tích dựa trên dữ liệu với tư duy tiến bộ và các đề xuất chuyên sâu phù hợp với mục tiêu của khách hàng, đồng thời định lượng các cơ hội có tác động lớn bằng các đề xuất rõ ràng để trình bày với khách hàng. Tìm hiểu sâu về cách hoạt động và cách sử dụng các sản phẩm quảng cáo của Google để đạt được nhiều mục tiêu tiếp thị. job_description: Responsible for all trade marketing activities of Diag Laboratories for Diag’s B2B customers. 1. Promotion Management: - Announce/ Train promotion program to related departments/ stakeholders. - Visit customers with Sales team to gather information, trends, customers, competitors… to set suitable promotion/program. - Visit key customers (doctors/ clinics) with the Sales team to deploy strategic program. - Ensure the promotion programs is delivered to end consumers/customers. - Track promotion program performance & recommend next steps for management. 2. POSM & Brand Visibility Management at Clinics/Hospitals - Plan, develop, and deploy POSM materials (standees, brochures, leaflets, posters, tent cards, signage, etc.) at partner locations. - Coordinate with the Sales team to ensure POSM is properly displayed according to brand guidelines. - Monitor POSM condition and manage regular replacement or replenishment. - Propose initiatives to increase brand visibility and coverage within healthcare facilities. - Manage POSM budget and work with suppliers to ensure quality and timely delivery. 3. Event/ Activation: 2-5 per quarters - Plan & Lead customer events (such as scientific seminars, workshops…) - Follow-up event checklist/Action Log with cross functional department to ensure event happen smoothly. 4. Hands-on experience in developing and executing promotions, activations, and POSM at point of sale. Strong understanding of GT/MT channels, shopper behavior, and in-store merchandising standards. Good analytical skills to evaluate sales performance, promotion effectiveness, and manage trade budgets. Strong cross-functional coordination skills; proactive, results-driven, and willing to travel for field visits.

Summary Imaging what you could do here! At Apple, creative ideas have a way of becoming wonderful products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish. The people here at Apple don’t just build products — they create the kind of wonder that’s revolutionized entire industries. It’s the diversity of those people and their ideas that inspires the innovation that runs through everything we do, from amazing technology to industry-leading environmental efforts. Join Apple, and help us leave the world better than we found it! The Regional Operations New Product Manager leads all aspects of new product development and product launch within Operations in Asia and is directly accountable for the results. Responsibilities include achieving goals for time to market, cost, quality, product availability and order cycle time. The New Product Manager in region is the primary leader and interface between Operations, Product Design, Engineering teams. Description Lead the operational side of development builds during new product introductions for any assigned products. Lead Apple team's new product introduction efforts during ramp within the Operations sphere. Specific goals include team leadership in driving issue resolution, supply chain design, schedule, cost, quality, availability and order cycle time goals. Engage with OEM manufacturing partners to develop, ramp, and introduce products. Develop rapport with partners and detailed knowledge of 'how the factory works,' its capabilities and limitations. Lead matrix team members from across all functions in Asia within Operations to develop new product plans. Typical functions include WW Planning, Global Supply Managers, Technical Program Manager, Quality, Supplier Quality Engineer, Test Engineer, Design For Manufacturing. Represent operations with the product design teams. Use production expertise to influence and negotiate for DFX, supply chain, testability, product features. Identify, marshall and organize resources (Apple Staff, OEM Staff, Contractors, etc) to meet required goals. Communicate project status updates to various project partners, including team members and executives within Apple and OEMs. Synthesize a multitude of issues into a clear, concise and focused message. Present with confidence and brevity. Always push the leading edge of innovation and excellence in Apple products and program management practices. Support coverage in other products in the region. Travel to another location on other products on an as-needed basis to drive issue resolution and/or support build/ramp activities. Minimum Qualifications A minimum of 5 years ops experience, preferably in a high tech or electrical device industry. Current knowledge of extraordinary supply chain management practices. Experience with consumer electronic manufacturing technologies (preferred) in the areas of design, process, commodity cost, factory cost, supply and quality management. Experienced in operations or technical program management roles preferred. Preferred Qualifications An MBA or MS. A combination of both formal education and experience in Engineering and business is preferred. Equivalent experience is acceptable. Track record achieving significant results on sophisticated projects in an often ambiguous and always constantly evolving environment. Demonstrated leadership in driving solutions to challenges. Incredible drive, motivation, and energy to completing any challenge given. Strong analytical capabilities coupled with good business savvy. Knowledge of massive data analysis, machine learning would be a plus. Exceptional communication skills (in both Mandarine Chinese & English) - verbal, written and executive presentations. Exceptional ability to establish relationships and exert effective influence in a matrix organization. Ability to think strategically, while driving tactical program execution. Attention to detail without becoming lost in the details. Operate in an ambiguous environment, taking charge in the absence of leadership.

Job Description We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Skilled Technician - Electrical to join our team in Phu Quoc, Vietnam. As a crucial member of our technical staff, you will be responsible for the installation, maintenance, and repair of various equipment and systems across our facilities. Install, commission, and maintain a wide range of equipment and systems according to manufacturer specifications and safety standards. Conduct routine inspections and perform preventive maintenance tasks to ensure optimal equipment performance and longevity. Diagnose technical issues and apply corrective measures promptly to minimise downtime. Execute repairs, including replacement of components and essential parts, to maintain reliable operation of all systems. Respond efficiently to urgent service requests, particularly during peak operational hours. Ensure compliance with local health, safety, and hygiene regulations whilst working in various areas of the facility. Safely handle tools, spare parts, and maintenance materials, adhering to proper usage and storage protocols. Maintain a clean and organised workspace, utilising appropriate tools and personal protective equipment (PPE). Report significant repair needs or potential equipment replacements to the supervisor for planning and approval. Keep accurate records of all maintenance work, including repairs and part replacements. Collaborate with other departments to support the effective operation of the facility and contribute to broader organisational goals. Qualifications High school diploma or equivalent required; vocational or technical certification in a relevant field is preferred. 3-5 years of hands-on experience in the installation, maintenance, and repair of commercial or industrial equipment. Strong technical knowledge of mechanical and electrical systems relevant to the facility's operations. Proven ability to diagnose, troubleshoot, and resolve faults in equipment efficiently and safely. Proficient in using hand tools, power tools, and diagnostic equipment relevant to the job role. Thorough understanding of safety protocols and regulatory compliance related to equipment maintenance and repair. Ability to read and interpret equipment manuals, technical drawings, and wiring diagrams. Physical fitness to perform manual tasks and work in various environmental conditions. Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Strong communication and interpersonal skills for effective collaboration with team members and other departments. Flexibility to work in shifts and respond to emergency calls when necessary. Familiarity with local regulations and standards in Phu Quoc, Vietnam is advantageous. Valid driver's licence may be required for on-site visits. Additional Information What Awaits You... The opportunity to join an international and innovative and fast-growing group, committed not only to building new hotels, but to creating a global brand. The ability to challenge the norm and work in an environment that is both creative and rewarding. Be part of a team that is very passionate about creating great hospitality experiences and exploring new locations with every opportunity. A competitive package and plenty of development opportunities.

job_description: DJRECRUIT ASIA We are headquartered in Hong Kong and operate in Vietnam, overseeing recruitment efforts within the APAC region. OUR CLIENT A leading fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) company with nationwide operations and a strong focus on retail and distribution excellence. They are looking for a Head of Supply Chain to lead the end-to-end supply chain for consumer products. This role will own planning through execution – ensuring availability, freshness, service level, and cost-to-serve across a multi-site network and multi-channel distribution model. RESPONSIBILITIES Develop and execute the overall supply chain strategy aligned with business objectives and long-term growth plans. Lead and manage end-to-end supply chain functions including procurement, supply planning, logistics, and supply chain optimization. Drive the Sales & Operations Planning (S&OP) process to ensure effective demand planning, supply alignment, and inventory management. Manage and optimize relationships with key suppliers and third-party logistics providers (3PLs) to ensure service quality and cost efficiency. Improve demand forecasting accuracy and ensure high customer service levels across the supply chain. Implement supply chain cost optimization initiatives, including logistics cost reduction and total cost of ownership (TCO) improvement. Define, monitor, and report supply chain KPIs linked to operational performance and financial outcomes. Lead and develop supply chain leadership teams across multiple functions and locations. Establish supply chain risk management frameworks and drive business continuity and resilience planning. Partner closely with finance and other cross-functional teams to manage budgeting, cost control, and supply chain financial forecasting. Drive supplier collaboration strategies and support make-or-buy decisions and supply base development. Ensure compliance with regulatory requirements and supply chain best practices across all operations. REQUIREMENTS Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Manufacturing Operations, Business Administration, or a related field. Minimum 10 years of experience in supply chain management, with at least 5 years in senior leadership roles within manufacturing environments. Strong experience across procurement, supply planning, logistics, and supply chain strategy. Proven experience managing complex supply chain operations across multiple locations. Experience working with ERP systems, preferably SAP. Strong leadership, stakeholder management, and team development capabilities. Excellent communication, negotiation, and supplier relationship management skills. Strategic mindset with the ability to drive operational improvements, cost efficiency, and business transformation initiatives. If you are interested in this role, please send your CV or any inquiries to jobs@djrecruit.com

We provide hosting space, future-proof upgrades, and 24/7 support through our smart or remote hands, ensuring seamless, secure, and sustainable service. Our fully remote, round-the-clock management frees businesses from supervision hassles, setting new benchmarks in data center solutions. We’re seeking skilled Freelance Data Center Technicians to join our growing team. If you have expertise in data center operations and want flexible work, we’d love to hear from you. Job Overview: As a Freelance Data Center Technician, you will play a key role in delivering on-demand support to our global data centers. Your responsibilities will include hardware installation, troubleshooting complex issues, and managing network operations, ensuring optimal performance and reliability. We’re looking for someone with deep expertise in data center equipment and software who can work independently while collaborating with remote teams. In this role, you’ll be essential to maintaining smooth, secure, and efficient data center operations, contributing to our high standards of service excellence. Key Responsibilities: Install, configure, and maintain servers, networking equipment, and other hardware to ensure optimal performance and maximum uptime, facilitating seamless operations within the data center. Monitor data center operations both remotely and on-site, quickly diagnosing and resolving hardware, software, and connectivity issues to minimize downtime and maintain service reliability. Configure, manage, and troubleshoot networking devices, including Cisco and Juniper routers, switches, and firewalls, to ensure secure and efficient network operations that align with organizational standards. Manage and troubleshoot both Linux and Windows-based systems, performing essential updates, patches, and security enhancements to keep systems secure and up-to-date. Document all installations, repairs, maintenance tasks, and system performance, providing comprehensive reports to the remote management team to ensure transparency and accountability in operations. Implement and maintain security protocols to protect the integrity of the data center infrastructure, ensuring compliance with industry standards and best practices for data security. Collaborate with remote IT teams, vendors, and stakeholders to enhance data center operations, actively participating in the planning and execution of projects that drive efficiency and innovation. What We Offer: Flexibility: Work around your existing freelance or permanent job. You choose the tickets you want to pick up, with no minimum hour commitment. Professional Environment: Join a professional work environment where you can reconnect with the practical side of IT. Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive rewards for your compensation and efforts. Growth Opportunities: Work with compelling clients and seize opportunities to grow in your field. Education: Associate or Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field is preferred but not required. Experience: 3+ years of experience in data center operations, with a strong focus on independent or freelance projects. Technical Skills: Extensive hands-on experience with Cisco and Juniper networking devices. Strong proficiency in managing and troubleshooting Windows and Linux-based systems. Solid understanding of networking principles (TCP/IP, DNS, VPN, VLANs). Experience with virtualization technologies such as VMware or Hyper-V is a plus. Certifications: Valid certifications like Cisco CCNA/CCNP, Juniper JNCIA/JNCIS, or CompTIA Linux+ are highly desirable. General Requirements: Ability to travel to various data center locations on short notice. Flexibility to work outside regular hours, including nights and weekends if required. Must have access to necessary tools and equipment to perform data center tasks. Strong problem-solving skills, with the ability to work independently and remotely. Excellent communication skills for collaboration with remote teams.

job_description: We are currently inviting a Preventive Mantenance Team Leader to join our growing manufacturing team in our newly established facility in Vĩnh Lộc 2 Industrial Zone Park, Mỹ Yên, Tây Ninh (Formerly Bến Lức, Long An) . Looking for a Workplace That Inspires You? Welcome to KC Overseas! At KC Overseas Education, we don’t just provide jobs—we create opportunities for innovation, growth, and impact. As a thriving Multinational EdTech company with 11 global locations, we have a strong foothold across South Asia, South-East Asia, and Africa, and we’re rapidly expanding worldwide. With our team of inspired 750+ professionals, we are revolutionizing access to overseas education through cutting-edge technology and unwavering expertise with our industry-leading platforms coursefinder.ai and elanloans.com. Our mission is to empower students worldwide with seamless access to top universities, bridging the gap between aspiration and reality. If you’re passionate about making a difference in the global education space, this is where you belong! At KC Overseas Education, we believe work should be more than just a job—it should be an experience that challenges, excites, and rewards you. We’re growing fast, and we want you to grow with us. Through our ever-expanding global reach, we are shaping the future of overseas education—and you can be a part of it. Why work with us? Work-Life Balance – We value productivity and well-being equally. Global Exposure – International travel and exposure to diverse markets Unmatched Growth – Thrive in a rapidly expanding industry to reach your potential Recognition & Rewards – A culture that values and rewards hard work Continuous Learning – Upskilling and development opportunities at every step Supportive Culture – Work in an encouraging, trust-driven environment Stability & Security – A long-term career with a leading industry player Competitive Compensation – Because great work deserves great rewards Join us and experience a workplace where talent is valued, ideas are celebrated, and careers flourish. Be a part of KC Overseas—apply now! MIHAN New Office Campus Launch Video - Here’s a short video to give you an overview of who we are and what we do: Why Build Your Career at KC? Hear Directly From Our International Team: Job Overview: The Regional Officer / Regional Manager plays a critical role in driving student conversions and partner performance within the assigned region. Acting as the primary liaison between channel partners and Head Office, the role ensures consistent service quality, operational excellence, and adherence to KC Overseas’ processes and brand standards. This is a field-intensive, target-driven role requiring strong partner management, operational oversight, and regional business development capabilities. Key Responsibilities: Oversee the end-to-end student lifecycle—from application processing to final conversion—across all channel partner offices in the assigned region. Drive and achieve region-specific student conversion targets. Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with channel partners. Negotiate commercial and operational terms, ensuring mutual alignment and sustainable growth. Provide comprehensive onboarding and ongoing training to partner teams. Maintain active engagement with partners through regular communication, reviews, and field visits. Identify and onboard new channel partners to expand regional reach and student volumes. Gain complete understanding of KC Overseas’ business model, systems, and SOPs. Ensure all partner offices strictly adhere to defined processes, documentation standards, and ethical practices. Act as the escalation point for resolving partner-level operational or quality issues. Guide and train agents to improve the quality and volume of student applications. Conduct regular knowledge-sharing and process-training sessions for partner teams. Liaise with Subject Matter Experts (SMEs) across Business Units to ensure partners are equipped with up-to-date country, university, and process knowledge. Work closely with Head Office teams to: Identify region-specific challenges and support requirements Ensure timely operational, academic, and marketing support to partners Act as the voice of the region in HO discussions and planning. Plan and execute regional marketing initiatives in collaboration with the HO marketing team. Provide on-ground support for events, seminars, fairs, and partner-led marketing activities. Customize marketing strategies to align with regional market dynamics and partner needs. Travel extensively across the assigned region, covering key cities and towns, to ensure business growth, partner engagement, and operational consistency. Career Prospects This is a sales-led, independent regional role with significant decision-making responsibility. Provides strong exposure to regional P&L management, preparing the incumbent for future leadership roles. Offers in-depth learning and interaction with international universities, academic stakeholders, and global education ecosystems. Job Requirements: Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (e.g., Business) is preferred. Total experience of 4–7 years, with a minimum of 2+ years in the International Education sector. Strong ability to collaborate with a diverse set of stakeholders. Ability to quickly learn and apply domain knowledge. Fluency in English, with strong verbal and written communication skills. Problem-solver, capable of navigating complex situations to deliver positive outcomes for students and partners.

job_description: Category Contract Engineer Location Thanh Hoa Number of vacancies 01 Responsibilities Procurement Section is looking for candidates for the position Contract Engineer with JD as below. Phát triển các component tái sử dụng theo yêu cầu dự án. Xử lý logic hiển thị dữ liệu từ API (RESTful, GraphQL). Hỗ trợ sửa lỗi (debug), tối ưu hiệu suất hiển thị của trang web. Vì vậy, hãy nộp đơn sớm để không bỏ lỡ cơ hội! Vui Lòng Gửi CV/Resume Về Hr@cystack.net Với Tiêu Đề Email [Job Application] SWE Frontend Intern - Họ Và Tên Của Bạn. job_description: Head of Corporate Operations Urgent Ho Chi Minh Non-tech/Non-engineer Job Summary We are looking for a hands-on and highly accountable Head of Corporate Operations to lead our core back-office functions: HR (labor, C&B, HR policy and evaluation), Accounting, and Legal. This role is a key safeguard for the company, responsible for ensuring compliance, risk control, and operational stability while working closely with small but critical teams on a day-to-day basis. Although this position holds overall accountability as a functional head, it requires a practical, hands-on leadership style rather than a purely supervisory approach. The Head of Corporate Operations works side by side with team members, stepping into operational matters when needed, and serves as a trusted escalation point for complex or sensitive issues. The role acts as a primary counterpart to Japan headquarters, balancing HQ alignment with local execution. This position reports directly to the CEO in Vietnam. However, due to the nature of the role, frequent collaboration and functional alignment with the Accounting and HR teams at Japan Headquarters are essential. This position does not cover Talent Acquisition or Internal Communication execution. Key Responsibilities Corporate Governance & Hands-on Leadership Hold overall accountability for corporate governance across HR, Accounting, and Legal functions. Lead small, specialized teams through close, hands-on engagement rather than top-down management. Act as the primary contact for corporate operations matters with Japan headquarters. Translate HQ policies into practical, compliant local operations in Vietnam. Stay closely involved in daily operational issues, stepping in directly when risks, exceptions, or complexities arise. Ensure regulatory compliance and manage operational and legal risks proactively. Must be willing and able to perform operational tasks independently (e.g., journal entry input, payroll calculation checks) to ensure business continuity during staff shortages or peak periods. HR and Accounting and Legal Operations HR Operations (Labor, C&B, Policy & Evaluation): The focus of this role is HR governance and labor compliance, with active involvement in day-to-day HR operations. Work closely with HR operations members on payroll governance, statutory compliance, and C&B administration using "Base" (HR system). Design, operate, and continuously improve performance evaluation policies and processes. Actively support employee lifecycle operations (onboarding, offboarding, contract renewal) from a compliance and risk perspective. Monitor labor law changes and directly reflect them in HR rules, policies, and practices. Serve as a practical escalation point for labor-related issues, audits, inspections, and complex employee cases. Lead the creation, maintenance, and real-world application of HR policies (working hours, leave, disciplinary actions, etc.). Support and develop HR operations team members through day-to-day collaboration While HRBP and Talent Acquisition executions are not managed in this role, collaborate closely with the HRBP & TA teams to ensure a seamless transition from hiring to onboarding, employee relations, managing the entry procedures effectively and ensuring good employee experiences. Accounting & Financial Operations (Hands-on Oversight) Accounting & Financial Operations (Financial Control & Reporting) Focus on Financial Control and Accounting Operations, with the primary objective of ensuring accurate figures and timely reporting to HQ (Reporting & Compliance) Oversee accounting operations with a strong focus on accuracy, controls, and reliability using "Multibook" (Accounting system). Work hands-on with internal accounting staff and external BPO vendors during monthly and annual closing processes. Actively support issue resolution related to accounting treatments, reconciliations, and reporting gaps. Serve as a key liaison with Japan headquarters on accounting and reporting matters. Ensure timely and accurate financial reporting while maintaining strong internal controls. Enable budgeting and planning processes by providing reliable data, without owning financial strategy or budget formulation. Monitor vendor performance and intervene directly when quality or timelines are at risk. Legal: Take ownership of company-wide legal operations in collaboration with internal and external stakeholders. Supervising in-house legal staff and serving as the primary contact for external legal counsel. Overseeing contract management processes, including reviewing and archiving agreements. Monitoring regulatory updates and ensuring company practices remain legally sound. Supporting legal risk mitigation through proper documentation and cross-departmental coordination. Responding to internal inquiries and guiding teams in compliance with legal requirements and internal policies. Process Improvement and Standardization Identify risks, inefficiencies, and control gaps by being close to actual operational workflows. Design and implement scalable yet practical back-office processes that teams can realistically follow. Improve operational clarity, transparency, and consistency without adding unnecessary bureaucracy. Support the company’s growth by strengthening its operational foundation. Preferred Qualifications 10–15+ years of experience in corporate operations, back-office management, or governance-related roles. Solid hands-on experience with HR labor operations, accounting oversight, and legal coordination. Strong understanding of Vietnamese labor laws, accounting/tax regulations, and legal frameworks. Proven ability to act as a "Bridge" between Vietnam and Japan; not merely translating policies, but possessing the negotiation skills to explain Vietnamese regulations and business customs to Japan HQ to gain understanding and buy-in. Experience working in IT or software development companies, preferably in a growth or scale-up phase. Proven ability to work closely with small teams and external service providers. High level of accountability, attention to detail, and practical problem-solving skills. Experience working with Japan-based companies or cross-border organizations is strongly preferred. Fluent in Vietnamese and business-level English; Japanese proficiency is a strong advantage. Key Attributes Leads by example and is comfortable rolling up sleeves Strong sense of ownership and responsibility Calm, steady presence in complex or sensitive situations Pragmatic and detail-oriented, without being bureaucratic Trusted by both frontline staff and senior stakeholders Our benefits Caring Mental & Physical Recreation Hybrid working: 2 days at the office and 3 days WFH Working hour: Flexible start 8AM-9AM from Mon-Fri Full salary in probation Insurance: Applied from Probation period: Social Insurance, Health Insurance, Unemployment Insurance (on 100% salary) Private health insurance & accident insurance. From Managing level: extra for family members Bonus: 13th month salary 16 - 24 paid days off and more Paternity leave: Extra 5 days Annual company trip; Quarterly team building Billiards & Running club Annual health check Well-equipped facility: Macbook pro, additional monitor,.. Job Responsibilities Implement the ESMS and OSHMS within the country context, adapting corporate procedures to local regulatory and cultural conditions. Oversee site-level Environmental and Social Management Plans (ESMPs), ensuring integration into day-to-day project execution and semi-annual reviews. Assist the Regional ESG Manager in due diligence activities, providing local context, site visits, data collection, and stakeholder consultations. Serve as the primary OSH lead at national level, driving safety performance and ensuring compliance with local labor and safety regulations. Oversee implementation of the Permit to Work (PTW) system, Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures, and Safe Work Procedures (SWPs) across all sites. Lead incident investigations, coordinate Corrective and Preventive Action Plans (CAPAs), and ensure lessons learned are integrated into procedures. Monitor leading and lagging OSH indicators and report trends to the Regional ESG Manager. Oversee Stakeholder Engagement Plans (SEPs) and ensure culturally appropriate and accessible grievance mechanisms at all sites. Build relationships with regulatory authorities, local government units, and community stakeholders. Ensure contractor ESG onboarding prior to mobilization, including mandatory orientation on ESMS, OSHMS, and site-specific requirements. Oversee contractor safety management, including prequalification, JHA review, PTW compliance, and performance monitoring. Conduct or coordinate contractor ESG audits and follow up on corrective action plans; evaluate contractor ESG performance for contract renewals. Conduct annual Training Needs Assessments and implement country-specific ESG training plans. Facilitate delivery of core training modules (ESG Induction, OHS, Environmental Management, Grievance Mechanism, Emergency Response) and role-specific training for ESG Focal Points. Ensure toolbox talks, pre-task briefings, and emergency drills are conducted at required frequencies. Supervise and provide technical support to ESG Focal Points, Environmental Officers, and Health and Safety Officers at project sites. Maintain monitoring systems for environmental, social, and OHS parameters aligned with ESMP and OSHMS requirements. Prepare monthly and quarterly ESSH reports covering compliance status, incidents, grievances, training metrics, and KPIs. Ensure timely submission of regulatory reports to host-country authorities and coordinate external audits by lenders and regulatory bodies. Oversee site-specific Emergency Preparedness and Response Plans (EPRPs), ensuring coordination with local authorities and communication in local languages. Coordinate emergency response for environmental, safety, and social incidents; lead post-incident reviews. Oversee implementation of Pollution Prevention and Resource Efficiency Programs, including waste management and hazardous materials handling. Ensure compliance with biodiversity management requirements, including Biodiversity Action Plans (BAPs) and critical habitat assessments where applicable. Oversee Cultural Heritage and Chance Find Procedures, ensuring protocols are embedded in construction method statements. Support land acquisition and resettlement processes aligned with IFC PS5, including livelihood restoration programs. Ensure implementation of Inclusion, Gender, and Livelihood Programs, including gender-sensitive engagement and workforce diversity tracking. Coordinate with the Project Development Department on ESG matters during project planning, permitting, and construction phases. Provide ESG assistance and support for operating assets, including ongoing compliance monitoring, periodic audits, and continuous improvement initiatives. Perform other duties and responsibilities as may be assigned by the Regional ESG Manager from time to time. Requirements Bachelor's degree in Environmental Science, Occupational Health and Safety, Engineering, Social Sciences, or related field. Advanced degree (Master's) in Environmental Management, Sustainability, or related discipline preferred. Minimum 7-10 years of experience in environmental, social, and/or OHS management. At least 5 years in the renewable energy, infrastructure, or construction sector. Experience with IFC Performance Standards, Equator Principles, and development finance institution requirements. Demonstrated experience managing ESG compliance for large-scale projects. Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and local language(s). Cultural sensitivity and ability to work effectively in multicultural environments. Strong interpersonal skills for engaging with diverse stakeholders including communities, government agencies, and contractors. Ability to facilitate training sessions, workshops, and community consultations. Active listening and empathy in handling grievances and stakeholder concerns. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills for risk assessment and incident investigation. Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously. Active listening and empathy in handling grievances and stakeholder concerns. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills for risk assessment and incident investigation. Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously. Attention to detail in reviewing documentation, audit reports, and compliance records. Systematic approach to monitoring, reporting, and continuous improvement. Ability to lead, supervise, and mentor ESG Focal Points, Environmental Officers, and Health and Safety Officers across multiple project sites. Strong decision-making capabilities for high-risk task approvals, incident response, and escalation of grievances. Effective collaboration with cross-functional teams including Project Managers, Business Development, Legal, and HR. Capacity to influence and drive safety culture across diverse contractor workforces. Conflict resolution and negotiation skills for stakeholder engagement and grievance management. Ability to coach and build capacity of site teams through training and technical guidance. Strong understanding of IFC Performance Standards (PS1-PS8), Equator Principles, and development finance institution requirements. Knowledge of ISO 45001 (Occupational Health and Safety) and ISO 14001 (Environmental Management Systems). Proficiency in HIRAC, Job Hazard Analysis (JHA), Permit to Work (PTW), and Lockout/Tagout (LOTO) procedures. Familiarity with ESIA/IEE processes, biodiversity assessments, and critical habitat evaluations. Understanding of land acquisition, resettlement frameworks, and livelihood restoration aligned with IFC PS5. Knowledge of pollution prevention, waste management, and hazardous materials handling requirements. Competence in ESG data management, monitoring systems, KPI tracking, and reporting. Understanding of stakeholder engagement methodologies and grievance mechanism design. Knowledge of host-country environmental laws and regulations (e.g., Environmental Impact Assessment requirements, environmental permits and clearances, protected area regulations, pollution control standards). Knowledge of host-country labor and occupational safety laws (e.g., Labor Code, Occupational Safety and Health Standards, workers' compensation requirements). Knowledge of host-country social regulations (e.g., Indigenous Peoples' rights, land acquisition and compensation laws, resettlement requirements, community consultation mandates).

job_title: Deal Analyst – Real Estate & Corporate Finance
job_description: Our client is an investment and corporate finance advisory firm supporting sophisticated transactions for high-net-worth and ultra-high-net-worth clients. Their work spans real estate, M&A, structured financing, and complex capital structures, often involving multi-entity and cross-border considerations. They operate with high standards, lean teams, and direct exposure to decision-makers and complex deal work. The Role We’re seeking a high-caliber Deal Analyst – Real Estate & Corporate Finance with strong investment banking–style financial modeling and valuation experience, particularly in real estate and structured transactions . This is a hands-on, execution-focused role suited to someone who is analytically sharp, “plug-and-play,” and comfortable operating independently within an established deal framework. You’ll work closely with senior leadership and initially receive onboarding support from an outgoing analyst and the Executive Director / Co-CEO. Role Details Commitment: Part-Time (starting at ~30 hours/week), with potential to grow to full-time Schedule: Full availability during CET working hours (non-negotiable) Location: Fully Remote Engagement: Independent Contractor Start Date: ASAP Rate: $10-15/hour, depending on level of experience (can be more if exceptional) What You’ll Do Financial Modeling & Deal Execution (Core Focus) Build and underwrite investment banking–level financial models, primarily single-asset real estate models Analyze real estate assets, including: Cash flows P&Ls DSCR and debt metrics Sensitivity and scenario analysis Structure and model complex capital stacks, including: Senior debt Mezzanine financing Preferred equity Waterfall structures Transaction Support Support transactions across: Real estate acquisitions and refinancing M&A transactions Growth and expansion capital Corporate financing Evaluate deal viability, challenge assumptions, and stress-test scenarios Prepare internal investment analyses and decision-support materials Requirements (Must-Have) 2+ years’ experience in one or more of the following: Investment banking Private equity Corporate finance Transaction advisory Strong, hands-on experience with: Financial modeling Valuation Deal underwriting Proven ability to model and understand: Single-asset real estate transactions Structured capital stacks, waterfalls, mezzanine and preferred equity Strong financial intuition and commercial common sense — not just technical skill Comfortable working in a fast-paced, high-expectation environment Full availability during CET working hours Nice-to-Haves (Strong Plus) Direct real estate transaction experience Exposure to hospitality, entertainment, or F&B real estate Experience supporting UHNW or institutional clients CFA or progress toward CFA (or similar finance credentials) Ideal Candidate Profile This role is ideal for someone who: Enjoys hands-on deal execution, not just academic analysis Is comfortable working with complex structures and high-stakes decisions Can operate independently while maintaining precision and discipline Thinks critically and challenges assumptions when needed Is looking for long-term growth rather than short-term project work Recruitment Process Initial Interview Client Interview Offer & Onboarding Powered by JazzHR kKb4nPmgYH

Voor Dak Elzendreef zijn wij op zoek naar een flexibele en enthousiaste pedagogisch medewerker voor een combinatiefunctie op de BSO en de peuteropvang . Het gaat om een tijdelijke vacature ter vervanging van zwangerschapsverlof , van april tot en met september . ’s Middags sta jij op onze BSO en zorg je voor een fijne, energieke en gezellige sfeer voor kinderen van 4 tot 7 jaar . Jij bedenkt en begeleidt leuke activiteiten die aansluiten bij hun interesses en talenten. Koken, tuinieren, knutselen of het stimuleren van artistieke creativiteit: jij draait er je hand niet voor om. De BSO aan de Elzendreef in Voorburg is dé plek waar kinderen na school nieuwe dingen ontdekken. Gitaarspelen? Jij organiseert de lessen. Dans, theater of een sportieve activiteit buiten? Jij maakt het mogelijk. Buiten spelen hoort daar natuurlijk ook bij – jij weet precies hoe je kinderen actief en enthousiast houdt. In de ochtenden werk je op de peuteropvang , waar je jonge kinderen een veilige, vertrouwde en stimulerende start van de dag biedt. Vier ochtenden per week op de peuteropvang Drie middagen per week op de BSO Het bedenken en begeleiden van creatieve, sportieve en educatieve activiteiten Het creëren van een veilige en fijne omgeving waarin ieder kind zichzelf kan zijn

Autobrains, a leading AI company in the automotive industry, is expanding! Following recent major design wins with leading global OEMs, we're scaling up our operations and innovation efforts. This is your chance to be part of a groundbreaking company at the forefront of automotive safety and intelligence. We are looking for passionate individuals who want to make a real impact, working on state-of-the-art AI solutions that save lives and transform the driving experience. job_description: Category Reliability Engineer Location Thanh Hoa Number of vacancies 02 Responsibilities We are looking for CVs for the role of Reliability Engineer in Maintenance Division. Job Description as specified below: The Reliability Engineer performs as a focal point on long-term problem solving by identifying threats, assessing risk, and collecting and analyzing performance data to drive the refinery to a more proactive and generative culture. Focal point for manage equipment reliability and availability process including Life Cycle Cost Analysis, Manage Threats and Availability (MTA), Bad Actor, Reliability Centered maintenance (RCM), Preventive maintenance optimization (PMO), CMMS data statistical and Reliability Availability Maintainability (RAM) study. General: Manage, maintain, update procedure, workflow, data system at sectional level in line with actual operation conditions, and Management Document Control system Maintenance execution: Audit implementation of work pack on system. QA/ QC – Involve in development of process/ system/ procedure to manage work quality on site. – Carry out audits to ensure that site work quality is achieved. Reliability – Carry out Overall reliability process audits to ensure compliance with established reliability process. – Conduct audit Reliability investigation process to ensure the system is complied with standard. – Conduct Threat to availability (MTA)- Score, prioritize, facilitate, track, assess, close out. – Conduct PM/ CM audit to ensure compliance. – Refinery Bad Actor – set up process to manage and quarterly generate comprehensive report. – Refinery Bad Actor – implement to address bad actor. – Conduct audit to ensure compliance, make sure the system is complied with standard for Refinery and Discipline bad actors. – Involve in development of long-term repair/ replacement strategies in order to manage asset life and obsolescence and to fit with the Refinery TA plan. – Verify the CMMS database has properly scheduled preventive maintenance, RCM, reliability information, (failure mode, failure code). Carry out manage & monitoring equipment reliability work process: – Use Solomon benchmark data to develop discipline gap closure plans. – Facilitate the creation and updating of the overall maintenance strategy, ensures all updates in RCM and SIS are incorporated to the maintenance plan. – Oversee the PM, PdM, and RCM programs. Facilitating Manage Threats to Availability (MTA) work process: – Identifying, prioritizing, and mitigating the appropriate threats. – Threats are created using a causal reasoning approach through use of the Five Causal Reasoning Questions (5CRQs). – Trains new team members on the use of MTA and work process. – Regular risk assessment meetings are conducted. Collect & Analyzes reliability performance data to identify trend and opportunities: – Collect maintenance cost and downtime cost. – Calculate maintenance efficiency index. – Calculate life cycle cost. – Perform life cycle cost for bad actors and expensive repairs. Conduct the Reliability Engineering Principles.: – Conduct Reliability Centered Maintenance (RCM). – Conduct Failure Modes and Effects Analysis (FMEA). – Conduct Life Cycle Cost Analysis (LCCA). – Conduct Weibull Analysis. – Conduct Pareto Analysis. Carry out asset hierarchy and equipment criticality ranking: – Review and develop equipment hierarchy. – Review and facilitating equipment criticality ranking. Facilitates learning for repeat failures and events. Focal point of contact person responsible for any critical or major equipment troubleshooting: – Focal point to conduct RCA for major equipment. – Focal point to contact vendor, supplier & service for major equipment troubleshooting investigation. – Focal point to conduct corrective action for top 10 refinery threat & bad actor. Other tasks as assigned by supervisor Requirements Background Mechanical, rotating, electrical, I&A Min 7 years of experience in maintenance in oil and gas industry Good understanding on equipment design practices and standards. Skilled in leading implementing equipment strategy including RCM, FMECA, RCA, ECA and Asset register hierarchy. Skilled in oil and gas, refinery and petrochemical process and maintenance philosophies. Skilled of international standards, petroleum/ petrochemical plant materials and equipment. Knowledge in rotating equipment knowledge – pumps, compressors, turbines, gas turbines, mechanical and dry gas seals. Experienced in maintenance practices including daily activities and turnaround planning/activities. Skilled in written and verbal communication skills. Skilled multi-tasking, problem solving and time management skills. Skilled in team leading. Skilled in read, write, and speak English (IELTS 6.5 or equivalent) Benefits High limit of medical and personal accident insurance for the employee and children; Personal Income Tax 50% deduction; Accommodation & Transportation to work: to follow the Employer’s policy; Free meal at site canteen (lunch).

job_title: Chuyên viên hiệu suất, Khối Khách hàng chiến lược
job_address: Củ Chi, Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam
industries: Information Services and Technology, Information and Internet
job_description: Please visit this Google Careers posting for the English-translated version of this role. Minimum qualifications: Bằng cử nhân hoặc kinh nghiệm thực tế tương đương. 2 năm kinh nghiệm trong lĩnh vực truyền thông kỹ thuật số, bán hàng, tiếp thị hoặc sản phẩm. Preferred qualifications: 3 năm kinh nghiệm bán hàng trong ngành công nghệ hoặc quảng cáo. Kinh nghiệm ra mắt sản phẩm ở nhiều thị trường. Khả năng giao tiếp lưu loát bằng tiếng Anh vì đây là vai trò giao tiếp với khách hàng, đòi hỏi phải trao đổi bằng tiếng Anh với các bên liên quan tại địa phương. Kỹ năng giao tiếp và quản lý nhân sự xuất sắc, cùng khả năng tác động đến các bên liên quan ở mọi cấp bậc. Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, có khả năng rút ra thông tin chi tiết từ dữ liệu. About the job Doanh nghiệp thuộc mọi loại hình và quy mô tin tưởng vào các giải pháp quảng cáo vượt trội của Google để tăng trưởng trong môi trường tiếp thị năng động hiện nay. Bạn lan toả niềm đam mê bán hàng, sự hiểu biết về truyền thông trực tuyến và lòng quyết tâm giúp khách hàng đạt được thành công lớn nhất. Bạn hành động với tinh thần làm chủ, nhanh nhạy thích ứng với mọi thay đổi, tìm kiếm những cách thức mới mang tính chiến lược để liên tục đem đến kết quả ấn tượng và ngày một tốt hơn cho cả Google và khách hàng. Bạn xây dựng mối quan hệ đáng tin cậy với khách hàng, tìm hiểu nhu cầu kinh doanh của họ và dựa vào đó để xây dựng các giải pháp hiệu quả giúp khách hàng đạt được những mục tiêu lớn lao nhất. Bạn gặt hái thành công cùng đội ngũ bán hàng, định hình tương lai của ngành quảng cáo trong kỷ nguyên AI và tạo dấu ấn thực sự đối với hàng triệu công ty cũng như hàng tỷ người dùng đặt trọn niềm tin vào Google cho những mục tiêu quan trọng nhất. Là một Chuyên viên hiệu suất, bạn sẽ thúc đẩy tăng trưởng danh mục sản phẩm ngày càng mở rộng tại thị trường Đông Nam Á. Bạn sẽ chịu trách nhiệm định hình chiến lược sản phẩm tại địa phương, cung cấp sản phẩm thúc đẩy hiệu suất (tìm kiếm, tăng hiệu suất, tạo nhu cầu), thúc đẩy việc sử dụng sản phẩm và tăng trưởng kinh doanh, đồng thời bản địa hoá các kế hoạch tiếp thị với các cộng sự liên phòng ban. Các nhóm thuộc Khối Khách hàng chiến lược (LCS) của Google là đối tác chiến lược và chuyên gia đầu ngành hỗ trợ các thương hiệu và công ty quảng cáo hàng đầu thế giới. Chúng tôi không ngừng khuyến khích khách hàng nhìn nhận lại hoạt động kinh doanh của họ và khám phá những cách Google có thể hỗ trợ họ tăng trưởng. Chúng tôi tập trung vào việc giúp các khách hàng này thích ứng với những thay đổi lớn trong ngành và thúc đẩy hiệu suất kinh doanh vượt trội bằng cách cung cấp trọn bộ giải pháp quảng cáo của Google ở mức giá cạnh tranh trên Google Tìm kiếm, YouTube, Đo lường, và nhiều nền tảng khác. Là một thành viên của khối LCS, bạn sẽ có cơ hội đặc biệt để kinh doanh những công nghệ tiên tiến nhất, làm việc với các quản lý cấp cao, tác động đến các chiến lược định hình thị trường và tạo ra kết quả thực tế, có ảnh hưởng đáng kể đến các doanh nghiệp lớn trên toàn cầu, cũng như thúc đẩy sự tăng trưởng của Google. Responsibilities Làm chủ và phát triển danh mục khách hàng sử dụng giải pháp tiếp thị dựa trên hiệu suất. Tăng mức sử dụng bộ tính năng Tối đa hoá AI, chiến dịch Tối đa hoá hiệu suất và chiến dịch Tạo nhu cầu, đồng thời bình thường hoá việc sử dụng AI trong hoạt động tiếp thị. Phát triển và thực thi một chiến lược sản phẩm phù hợp với nhu cầu và thách thức của thị trường Đông Nam Á. Tiến hành nghiên cứu thị trường để xác định các xu hướng mới nổi, nhu cầu của khách hàng và bối cảnh tương tác ở từng quốc gia Đông Nam Á. Làm việc với các nhóm bán hàng, tiếp thị, kỹ thuật và các nhóm khác để đảm bảo quá trình phát triển, ra mắt và sử dụng sản phẩm diễn ra liền mạch. Theo dõi các chỉ báo hiệu suất chính và thúc đẩy cải tiến liên tục trong quá trình sử dụng sản phẩm, cũng như trong việc tương tác và đảm bảo sự hài lòng của khách hàng. Hỗ trợ khách hàng, đảm bảo ý kiến phản hồi của họ được đưa vào lộ trình sản phẩm và các quy trình ra quyết định. Qua đó, Vin Nexus Center mong muốn góp phần tháo gỡ những rào cản trong tiếp cận giáo dục, đồng thời mở ra cơ hội học tập công bằng hơn cho mọi người. Cơ sở Vin Nexus Center đầu tiên dự kiến khai giảng vào tháng 09/2026 tại khu đô thị Vinhomes Ocean Park 3 (Hưng Yên), để chuẩn bị khai giảng, chúng tôi cần tuyển dụng vị trí Chuyên viên Tâm lý lâm sàng. I. MÔ TẢ CÔNG VIỆC Thực hiện đánh giá đầu vào tâm lý toàn diện cho học sinh, bao gồm các lĩnh vực nhận thức/trí tuệ, hành vi và cảm xúc, thông qua các công cụ chuẩn hóa phù hợp. Tham gia quá trình chẩn đoán hoặc xác định chẩn đoán, đồng thời xây dựng báo cáo chuyên môn và đưa ra khuyến nghị can thiệp phù hợp cho từng học sinh. Xây dựng kế hoạch và triển khai trị liệu tâm lý cá nhân hoặc nhóm đối với học sinh có khó khăn về cảm xúc và hành vi đi kèm. Tư vấn cho giáo viên và phụ huynh về các chiến lược hỗ trợ tâm lý và hành vi trong môi trường lớp học và tại gia đình. Tham gia các cuộc họp IEP, case conference và cung cấp ý kiến tư vấn lâm sàng đối với các trường hợp học sinh có nhu cầu hỗ trợ phức tạp. Ghi chép hồ sơ chuyên môn, theo dõi tiến độ trị liệu và đánh giá kết quả can thiệp định kỳ cho đội ngũ lâm sàng và phụ huynh. Ii. Yêu Cầu Công Việc Tốt nghiệp Thạc sĩ chuyên ngành Tâm lý học lâm sàng hoặc chuyên ngành phù hợp với vị trí ứng tuyển. Có chứng chỉ sử dụng các công cụ đánh giá chuẩn hóa phù hợp với chuyên môn. Có từ 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm trong công tác hỗ trợ tâm lý trong môi trường học đường. Có năng lực đánh giá chẩn đoán, xây dựng case formulation và đưa ra định hướng hỗ trợ phù hợp cho học sinh. Có kinh nghiệm tư vấn cho giáo viên và phụ huynh trong việc hỗ trợ tâm lý và hành vi học sinh, đặc biệt là với học sinh có nhu cầu giáo dục đặc biệt. Tuân thủ nghiêm túc các quy định về đạo đức nghề nghiệp và quy trình chuyên môn. Có khả năng sử dụng tiếng Anh thông thạo trong công việc chuyên môn. Iii. Quyền Lợi Thu nhập cạnh tranh tương xứng với năng lực và đóng góp của mỗi cá nhân. Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, công bằng, tạo cơ hội phát triển bản thân và nghề nghiệp, đồng thời đóng góp những giá trị khác biệt cho xã hội. IV. job_description: Overview Join us to build the future of AI-powered observability for one of the world’s largest hyperscale data platforms supporting Office 365 services. You’ll work on mission-critical systems that process petabytes of data daily, enabling real-time diagnostics and predictive insights for hundreds of millions of users worldwide. In this role, you’ll develop SDKs and frameworks to create a unified Signal Fabric with consistent, self-registering, semantically rich telemetry across languages; transform traditional dashboards into AI-first observability streams; and drive automation through feedback loops that continuously improve signal quality, coverage, and relevance. If you’re passionate about distributed systems, cloud-scale engineering, and building AI-driven solutions that shape the future of service reliability and user experience, this is your opportunity to make a global impact. Microsoft’s mission is to empower every person and every organization on the planet to achieve more. As employees we come together with a growth mindset, innovate to empower others, and collaborate to realize our shared goals. Each day we build on our values of respect, integrity, and accountability to create a culture of inclusion where everyone can thrive at work and beyond. Responsibilities Design and build Signal Fabric: Develop SDKs and frameworks that ensure consistent, self-registering, semantically rich telemetry across multiple languages. Enable AI-first observability: Transform traditional dashboards and manual triage into machine-readable, self-improving telemetry streams optimized for AI systems. Scale hyperscale data ingestion: Work on systems that process petabytes of mission-critical data daily, powering real-time diagnostics and predictive insights for Office 365 services. Drive automation and intelligence: Implement feedback loops to continuously improve signal quality, coverage, and relevance, reducing iteration cost and accelerating insight cycles. Collaborate globally: Partner with engineering, product, and data science teams to deliver actionable insights that improve service quality, user experience, and feature usage. Innovate for impact: Prepare observability for the AI era by building solutions that empower hundreds of millions of users and influence Microsoft’s cloud reliability strategy Responsible for the daily operations and maintenance of the live service and ensure quality of service. Qualifications Required Qualifications: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, or related technical discipline with proven experience coding in languages including, but not limited to, C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, or Python OR equivalent experience. Solid communication skills (Good written English, Avg+ oral English) Passionate to solve hard problems and AI-driven automationPassionate to learn new skills/knowledge. job_description: Phúc Lợi Thu nhập 25 - 35tr/tháng cạnh tranh theo năng lực BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định của pháp luật Lương tháng 13, thưởng lễ Tết Các chế độ khác theo quy định của luật Mục tiêu công việc Nhân viên Hỗ trợ Bán hàng Tổng hợp chịu trách nhiệm chính trong việc thực hiện các hoạt động hỗ trợ chung nhằm phục vụ việc triển khai các hoạt động bán hàng, quy trình bán hàng, nhiệm vụ và dự án. Vị trí này yêu cầu có kỹ năng chuyên môn để thực hiện phân tích trong phạm vi nhiệm vụ được giao, cùng với kiến thức lý thuyết chuyên sâu về các quy trình và công cụ bán hàng chính cũng như cơ cấu tổ chức liên quan. Phạm vi trách nhiệm chính Cung cấp các hỗ trợ tổng thể cho bộ phận Bán hàng, bao gồm: Hỗ trợ chuẩn bị hồ sơ, tài liệu cho đấu thầu gửi đến đối tác kênh/khách hàng, thư theo quy trình bán hàng. Chuẩn bị và xử lý hồ sơ, chứng từ liên quan đến Đơn đặt hàng (PO) và hợp đồng. Chịu trách nhiệm kiểm tra chất lượng tài liệu, đảm bảo đầy đủ và chính xác thông tin chung. Cung cấp đơn hàng đã được làm sạch dữ liệu cho bộ phận Quản lý Đơn hàng (GBS). Là đầu mối liên hệ chính tiếp nhận đơn hàng từ bộ phận kinh doanh tại địa phương. Tuân thủ chặt chẽ các quy trình bán hàng và các yêu cầu về tuân thủ nội bộ. Đảm bảo tất cả tài liệu được chuẩn bị đạt tiêu chuẩn chất lượng. Có khả năng xây dựng và triển khai các dự án cải tiến liên tục quy mô nhỏ trong một đơn vị thương mại. Đề xuất và triển khai các hoạt động hỗ trợ quy trình mới. Phản hồi các yêu cầu cung cấp thông tin từ bên ngoài và nội bộ. Đánh giá sự phù hợp trong việc sử dụng và áp dụng các công cụ hành chính. Cung cấp dữ liệu phục vụ cho các hoạt động phân tích khi cần thiết. Đảm bảo chất lượng dữ liệu cung cấp cho GBS. Hỗ trợ cải tiến liên tục các quy trình bán hàng; hỗ trợ ban quản lý bán hàng trong việc xác định các điểm nghẽn và sự không nhất quán trong quy trình. Tốt nghiệp đại học Có khả năng làm việc độc lập theo các quy trình và tiêu chuẩn đã thiết lập Có khả năng đóng vai trò điều phối, dẫn dắt công việc của các thành viên khác khi cần Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt (bằng lời nói và văn bản) Có khả năng làm việc đa nhiệm và chủ động trong môi trường có thời hạn gấp

job_description: Key Role Ensure high-quality trucking services that consistently exceed the expectations of customers and the Sales team. Ensure effective communication and close coordination with the Sales team, customers, trucking vendors, and relevant internal departments to achieve optimal operational efficiency. Job Description Receiving and handling transportation requests: Receive shipment information from Sales/customers; check rates, negotiate with trucking vendors to obtain the most competitive pricing, and provide timely feedback. Arrange transportation plans and send dispatch schedules (pick-up/delivery) to trucking vendors according to customer requirements. Monitoring and dispatching: Regularly update vehicle status and shipment delivery progress; promptly notify cargo owners of any incidents and proactively coordinate with Sales and customers to resolve issues in a timely manner, ensuring service quality and on-time delivery via communication channels such as Zalo, phone calls, etc. For import shipments, closely monitor cargo pick-up schedules and update the warehouse on estimated arrival times so that manpower can be arranged accordingly. Ensure customer requirements are met according to standards, such as selecting clean and well-conditioned empty containers, requesting trucks to back into unloading docks, and other specific requirements. Continuously update shipment information to ensure full control of the transportation process and immediate response when customers request status updates. Trucking vendor management and service evaluation: Conduct monthly evaluations of trucking vendors in terms of costs, service quality, and performance. Propose improvements or identify alternative trucking vendors to optimize costs and continuously enhance customer service quality. Payment processing and system operations: Regularly collect statements and reimbursable invoices, input data into the system, and process payments for trucking vendors. Coordinate with shipping lines to resolve issues related to container deposits upon empty container returns. Perform other tasks as assigned by the Manager. Job Requirements Education: College or university degree in Import–Export, Logistics, International Payment, or related fields. Experience: Minimum 1 year of experience in a similar position; preference for candidates with experience in logistics or forwarding companies. Experience in reading and understanding logistics documents such as bookings and customs declarations to ensure proper container drop-off at the correct port of loading. Skills: Good command of office computer skills. Strong problem-solving ability and quick situational judgment. Personal Attributes: Honest, responsible, and proactive. Agile, detail-oriented, and reliable. Benefits Compensation & Rewards: KPI-based bonuses, 13th-month salary, public holiday and Tet bonuses, annual salary review, birthday gifts, and year-end recognition awards. Health & Engagement: Periodic health check-ups, annual company trips (domestic and international), Year End Party (YEP), and internal engagement activities. Statutory Benefits: Social insurance, health insurance, annual leave, public holidays, and other benefits in accordance with Labor Law regulations. Working Environment: Professional and dynamic working environment with opportunities for continuous learning through internal knowledge-sharing sessions and a clear career development path. ————————————— Work time Monday to Friday: Morning: 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM, Afternoon: 1:30 PM – 5:30 PM. Saturday: Working in the morning 8:00 AM – 12:00 PM, with 2 Saturdays off per month. Work location 39-41 Street B4, An Khanh Ward, Ho Chi Minh City (Sala, District 2) Contact us Email address: recruitment@reallogistics.vn Phone number: (+84) 28 3636 3888 – Ext: 126 (Ms. Dung)

job_description: Thực hiện dịch vụ sau bán hàng bao gồm cài đặt phần cứng/phần mềm, vận hành, và đào tạo tại chỗ cho khách hàng. Xử lý bảo trì định kỳ và bảo trì khẩn cấp một cách kịp thời. Tư vấn cho khách hàng về cách vận hành đúng cách các máy móc. Cung cấp đào tạo tại chỗ cho khách hàng hoặc khách hàng nội bộ với vai trò là chuyên gia kỹ thuật sản phẩm cụ thể. Duy trì chất lượng công việc nhất quán với các Chỉ số Hiệu suất Chính (KPI) đã cam kết. Thiết lập và duy trì mối quan hệ khách hàng tốt để đảm bảo sự hài lòng của khách hàng. Tìm hiểu về sản phẩm và dịch vụ, và luôn cập nhật các thay đổi mới nhất. Báo cáo cho Quản lý Dịch vụ về tất cả các hoạt động kỹ thuật. Thực hiện các hoạt động liên quan đến kỹ thuật khác Requirements Kinh nghiệm Ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm trong ngành máy photocopy/máy in/công nghiệp in ấn hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan. Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng/Đại học chuyên ngành Kỹ thuật Điện/Điện tử/Cơ khí/Tự động hóa. Có kinh nghiệm trong việc cung cấp dịch vụ phần cứng và phần mềm, bảo trì và tư vấn. Kinh nghiệm trong in laser công nghiệp là một lợi thế. Năng lực Tư duy lấy khách hàng làm trung tâm, tinh thần chiến thắng. Thành thạo máy tính và một số phần mềm ứng dụng văn phòng phổ biến. Hiểu biết tốt và có kỹ năng về mạng máy tính, máy chủ, cơ sở dữ liệu. Khả năng phân tích, trình bày và giải quyết vấn đề tốt, định hướng kết quả và chất lượng. Có khả năng làm việc độc lập và làm việc nhóm, sẵn sàng đi công tác xa khi cần. Có tinh thần làm việc nhóm cao và quan tâm đến chăm sóc khách hàng; năng động, thuyết phục, kiên cường, có động lực và sẵn sàng đối mặt với thử thách mới. Có khả năng giao tiếp tiếng Anh ở mức cơ bản (tương đương bằng B). Benefits Làm việc trong môi trường quốc tế, năng động và chuyên nghiệp. Được đào tạo về kỹ năng kỹ thuật theo tiêu chuẩn quốc tế. Mức lương hấp dẫn, thưởng hiệu suất, và gói trợ cấp. Bảo hiểm theo quy định của Bộ luật Lao động Việt Nam và bảo hiểm tai nạn/y tế bổ sung. Lương tháng 13 và xét duyệt tăng lương hàng năm, cơ hội thăng tiến rõ ràng.

Cập nhật thông tin khách hàng, nhà xe, đại lý cho các bộ phận liên quan như AM, Product, QC-Content. Đóng góp vào việc cải thiện quy trình nội bộ và nâng cao chất lượng sản phẩm, dịch vụ. job_description: Position: Order Fulfillment Specialist Location : Empress Tower, 138 – 142 Hai Bà Trưng, Dist. 1, HCMC . Working time: Onsite Monday – Friday, flexible wfh on Saturday. JOB SUMMARY: The Order Fulfillment Specialist oversees and manages the complete the process, from customer orders being placed to the products being delivered to the customer. This role plays a key part in ensuring accurate and timely order execution while driving process efficiency across the supply chain. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: Order Management: Receive, verify and process orders accurately and efficiently in SAP following regulated SOP, including sales orders, promotion campaign, NPD allocation and POSM. Plan and optimize truck load while ensuring order cut-off time and requested delivery date at Customers. Liaise with warehouse, transporters, and sales teams to ensure smooth and timely order fulfillment. Provide order status updates, handle customer inquiries, and manage returns and exchanges. Collaborate with related functions such as QA, Logistics, Sales to troubleshoot and resolve any issues that arise during the fulfillment process, such as delays or incorrect items. Monitor credit limits of the assigned customers in line with credit policy. Analyze and suggest ways to improve fulfillment processes for greater efficiency and accuracy Reporting and documentation Maintain operational reports and tracking on regular basis (daily/ weekly/ monthly). Maintain accurate records of orders, shipments and billings and update order statuses in the system. Other tasks assigned by Line Manager.

Summary Imagine what you could do here! At Apple, new insights have a way of becoming extraordinary products, services, and customer experiences very quickly. Bring passion and dedication to your job and there's no telling what you could accomplish. We are strengthening the team, and we are seeking a dynamic Manufacturing Quality Engineer. We feature a collaborative environment with creative, smart people and groundbreaking technologies. Join us and make a difference! In this highly visible role, you will have the chance to create a significant impact on Apple Products, and leave a footprint for years to come. We have an opportunity for an accomplished quality engineer to lead development, and ramp for a next generation Apple product. Description Our quality engineering team enables the mass creation of impossible products as a partner in the development of Apple's renowned designs. You will involve in new product development, partner with multi-functional teams to evaluate design and processes maturity study, define quality requirement and manufacturing control plan. Develop measurement technologies and quality system that achieves adventurous specifications at mass production scale. Thiết lập quy trình quản lý, chương trình đào tạo và hệ thống báo cáo phù hợp với dự án dựa trên tiêu chuẩn của Công ty. Điều phối, sắp xếp và giám sát kết quả công việc của các bộ phận (Kỹ thuật, Dịch vụ khách hàng, Kế toán), đảm bảo tuân thủ đúng quy trình và tiêu chí chất lượng. Trực tiếp tham gia tuyển dụng và đào tạo nhân viên mới. Kiểm soát các khoản thu chi tại dự án (thu phí quản lý từ cư dân/khách thuê); lựa chọn nhà thầu cung cấp dịch vụ; kiểm soát chi phí chi trả cho các nhà thầu (thu gom rác thải, chăm sóc cây xanh, vệ sinh khu vực chung và bên ngoài tòa nhà, v.v...). Trong phạm vi quyền hạn hoặc có phê duyệt của Trưởng bộ phận, làm việc với Chủ đầu tư hoặc Ban Quản trị về các vấn đề liên quan (đệ trình phương án, chi phí phát sinh, thay đổi nhân sự, thu hồi công nợ). Đại diện Chủ đầu tư/Ban Quản trị làm việc và phối hợp với các cơ quan chức năng trong các vấn đề thông lệ hoặc phát sinh liên quan đến dự án và cư dân. Thực hiện đầy đủ báo cáo hàng tháng về tình hình hoạt động (chất lượng dịch vụ, tài chính, đào tạo, an toàn lao động) cho Trưởng bộ phận. Đảm bảo cư dân/khách thuê tuân thủ nội quy và pháp luật; tiếp nhận và giải quyết nhanh chóng mọi khiếu nại trong phạm vi thẩm quyền. Tham gia xây dựng quy chế, các sự kiện, chương trình truyền thông và marketing để quảng bá dịch vụ quản lý của Công ty. YÊU CẦU: Có 3+ năm kinh nghiệm từng đảm nhiệm vị trí trưởng ban/giám đốc quản lý tòa nhà Am hiểu các quy định pháp lý liên quan Khả năng điều phối, giám sát và tổ chức công việc khoa học. Kỹ năng giao tiếp tốt; khả năng giao tiếp bằng tiếng Anh là một lợi thế lớn. Khả năng phán đoán sự cố, xử lý tình huống linh hoạt; có kiến thức về tài chính và nhân sự. Xin lưu ý rằng khi gửi hồ sơ ứng tuyển cho chúng tôi, bạn đồng ý với việc chúng tôi xử lý dữ liệu cá nhân về bạn do bạn cung cấp cho mục đích tuyển dụng của công ty chúng tôi. Bạn có thể gửi thắc mắc hoặc yêu cầu hỗ trợ liên quan đến hoạt động xử lý dữ liệu cá nhân của chúng tôi tới email: info@savills.com.vn. Để hiểu rõ hơn về hoạt động xử lý dữ liệu cá nhân của chúng tôi, vui lòng truy cập https://vn.savills.com.vn/footer/privacy-policy.aspx để xem toàn bộ Thông báo về xử lý dữ liệu cá nhân của Công ty TNHH Savills Việt Nam.

The Distributor Management Executive (DME) partners with the Regional Sales Manager/Sales Manager to manage assigned distributors, supporting monthly performance reviews, action planning, sales activities, forecasting, and compliance. Data Quality Analyst Job Summary: We are seeking for a Data Quality Analyst to ensure reliability, accuracy, and consistency of datasets used for Artificial Intelligence training and business intelligence systems. The role focuses on auditing datasets, identifying anomalies, resolving inconsistencies, and maintaining high-quality data standards. You will assess dataset completeness, labeling accuracy, formatting consistency, and compliance with project guidelines. This role is essential in preventing model bias, improving prediction reliability, and maintaining trustworthy AI systems. Key Responsibilities Audit datasets for quality and consistency. Identify data errors and anomalies. Validate annotations and labeling accuracy. Develop data quality checks and validation rules. Monitor dataset integrity across projects. Job Requirements Bachelor’s Degree in Data Science, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field. Must possess a Data validation and auditing skills. Knowledge of data governance concepts. Data Quality Management Certification (advantage) Must be certified as a Google Data Analytics Certification or Microsoft Data Fundamentals, Data Governance or Data Management Certification (optional) 3-5 years’ experience in data quality, analytics, or data operations.
